scripts._comment_dev: Runs the app in development mode with hot-reloading at localhost
scripts._comment_build: Compiles and optimizes the application for production deployment
scripts._comment_start: Starts the compiled production build locally
scripts._comment_lint: Runs ESLint to check for syntax errors and code quality issues
scripts._comment_typecheck: Validates TypeScript types across the project without emitting files
scripts._comment_prisma:generate: Generates the Prisma Client types to match your current schema
scripts._comment_format: Automatically formats all code files in the project using Prettier rules
scripts._comment_prepare: Sets up Husky Git hooks to run automated checks before commits
scripts._comment_db:seed: Populates the database with initial mock data like Admin users and cars
scripts._comment_db:migrate: Tracks history and updates schema changes (prompts to reset if schema conflicts)
scripts._comment_db:push: Pushes the current schema to the database instantly without losing existing data
